description.short: Your AI-powered dev workspace in Teams
description.full: StewSage is a one-stop AI dev assistant for Stewart engineers. View bugs and user stories, get AI-generated code fixes, raise PRs, check sprint status, and monitor pipelines — all without leaving Teams.

commands.title: View Work Items
commands.description: List open bugs and user stories from the current sprint

commands.title: Fix Bug 1
commands.description: Get an AI-generated code fix for bug #1 and optionally raise a PR

commands.title: List PRs
commands.description: Browse and review pull requests across your repositories

commands.title: Raise PR
commands.description: Pick repo and branches, AI writes the PR title and description for you

commands.title: Sprint Status
commands.description: View current sprint name, dates, and progress at a glance

commands.title: Pipeline Status
commands.description: Check the health and recent runs of your CI/CD pipelines

commands.title: Run Pipeline
commands.description: Trigger a pipeline run directly from the chat

commands.title: List Repos
commands.description: Browse all repositories in the Azure DevOps project
